ProjectHeader.title: Private Learning Hub with AI-Powered PDF Interaction

disclaimer: Images are from the product interface - © All rights reserved

CompanyInfo.title: Services
CompanyInfo.details: Fullstack Development, UI/UX, AI Integration, PDF Processing

ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: Build a modern, responsive, and accessible web platform for private education, enabling users to read, search, and interact with PDF content, listen to audio lessons, and chat with an AI assistant for contextual learning.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenges
Details: Implementing server-side PDF text extraction and context-aware AI chat using RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation).
Managing secure, expiring signed URLs for private PDF and audio content via Supabase.
Designing a responsive sidebar navigation with stateful collapse and mobile support.
Integrating a custom audio player for lessons, with Supabase-hosted MP3s.
Ensuring accessibility, dark mode, and smooth animations throughout the UI.
Optimizing for performance and bundle size, including externalizing heavy PDF parsing.
Maintaining a modular, scalable codebase with clear separation of concerns and reusable hooks.
Implementing robust testing with Jest and snapshot UI regression.
